questions.question: Which of the following joint military exercises is conducted annually between the armies of India and Japan, with the sixth edition held near Mount Fuji in 2025?
Which of the following is the first of eight Anti-Submarine Warfare Shallow Water Crafts (ASW SWCs) delivered to the Indian Navy on 8 May 2025?
In 2025, ISRO sprouted which of the following seeds in space under microgravity conditions?
Which organisation published the 2025 edition of the 'State of the World’s Nursing' report?
During May 2025, the 4ᵗʰ Europe-Africa Forum was organised in which location?
In January 2025, which state cricket association unveiled plans to construct the largest cricket stadium in India, with a seating capacity of 1.25 lakh spectators?
By when has India aimed to achieve its defence production of ₹3 lakh crore, which will strengthen its position as a global defence manufacturing hub?
Ashok Chandra assumed charge as Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer of ____________ on 16ᵗʰ January 2025.
Who among the following translated the book ‘Heart Lamp’ from Kannada to English, for which the author won the prestigious International Booker Prize in May 2025?
Before becoming the Chief Justice of India, Justice BR Gavai served in which court?
Which agency on 2025 authorised to share information with the Enforcement Directorate (ED) under the Prevention of Money Laundering Act to combat cyber fraud?
In which year was the Paris Agreement adopted?
Which ISRO mission, launched in May 2025, aims to enhance India's all-weather day-and-night Earth observation capabilities?
Which of the following countries was elected to the Vice Presidency of the International Association of Marine Aids to Navigation and Lighthouse Authorities (IALA) in 2025?
What is the purpose of the submarine cable project launched by the Indian National Centre for Ocean Information Services (INCOIS) in 2025?
questions.option_4: Increase internet speed in coastal areas

questions.question: The 'Nuclear Energy Mission for Viksit Bharat' aims to achieve how much nuclear energy capacity by 2047?
What is the projected valuation of India's satellite communication (satcom) market by 2028?
Where was the 12ᵗʰ World Government Summit, 2025, held?
Who was appointed as the Chairman of the Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) in 2025, succeeding Preeti Sudan?
The foundation day anniversaries of which two Indian states was celebrated on 20 February 2025?
The 13ᵗʰ edition of the joint military exercise 'Ekuverin' 2025 was conducted in which country?
What was the significant change in funding norms for National Sports Federations (NSFs) announced by the Indian government in 2025?
questions.option_1: Reduction in financial assistance for training athletes
questions.option_2: Elimination of funding for foreign coaches in order to promote Indian coaches and youth development programmes
questions.option_4: Allocation of at least 20% of their annual budget toward junior and youth development programmes

questions.question: Who has developed the technology enabling India to shoot down fixed-wing drones using a laser beam?
Which Indian astronaut participated in the Axiom Mission-4 to the ISS in 2025 to conduct space agriculture experiments?
Who was the Chairman and Chief Executive Officer (CEO) of the Railway Board as on 1ˢᵗ May 2025?
